title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 25 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 25 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 25 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/08/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures rose sharply, with the most-traded I2601 contract closing at 787, up 2.27% from last Friday. Traders' enthusiasmfor quoting prices was moderate; steel mills were cautious and mainly purchasing as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
